name: Intro
_source: m;A Hint of Things to Come

s;;Agreeing to help Anna and Jake,|Krista and friends head northwards the mercantile town of Weissel.|Danger lurks around the corner, eager to steal their wards' valuables from under their noses.;StyleNid=overworld_narration
for;EnemyGender;[unit.nid for unit in game.get_enemy_units() if unit.generic == True and 'NoVariant' not in unit.tags]
for;EnemyGender;[unit.nid for unit in game.get_enemy2_units() if unit.generic == True and 'NoVariant' not in unit.tags]

#Anna and Jake gaiden. They need help fending off a local bandit group who has been ambushing merchants on this trade route. The party has to make sure all merchant carts make it from one side of the map to the other.
s;Jake;Looks like the convoy made it here safe and sound too.|Let's go touch base with them, Your Highness.
s;Man2;I must thank you for agreeing to help us, Your Highness.
s;Krista;Don't mention it!{c:e;Krista;NoSmile} Besides, we gotta actually get you all to town safely first.
s;Anna;Once we hit that path up north, we should be in the clear.
s;Anna;The obvious obstacle, of course, would be those gates up ahead.
s;Anna;Once we get rid of the guards, we can go through those gates!
s;Jake;The Ravine Raiders set those up a while back.|We've been having to either pay their toll,|or take a longer route to get to Weissel.
s;Krista;Well, that ends today!|With us by your side, we'll get everyone to Weissel in no time!

s;Anna;Another thing, Your Highness.|Other merchants may come along to cause trouble too.|{c:e;Anna;CloseEyes,Smile}Steal our merch, wreck our wagons, you name it.|{c:e;Anna;NormalBlink,Smile}So, keep a look out for them, alright?
prep;true;Prepare to Charge;Guide;True;AccessLibrary;Access the guide for tips and tricks.;gba;no_chap_disp
